title: Follow Through
description:
Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
If the last card you played this turn was a Skill, apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
upgraded_description:
Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
If the last card you played this turn was a Skill, apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
notes: Glow effect triggers when the last card played this turn was a Skill.
